observations.archetype_gloss: The internalized grief and paralysis following loss
observations.summary: Aviel embodies the Shadow archetype as he ceases to function after the death of his wife, representing the internalized grief and emotional paralysis that haunts him.

evidence.quote: But when Mother Zuna passed beyond recall—when they buried his bride beneath the earth—something stopped within him. Not died, which would have been cleaner and quicker, but simply ceased like a cart with a cruelly shattered axle.
